title: Smoky Grilled Chicken Paella
description: A smoky and velvety Argentinean dish featuring saffron, grilled chicken, and a halal-friendly twist.
instructions: Mix the minced garlic and onion in a bowl. Season with salt, pepper, paprika, and cumin. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add saffron threads for about 2 minutes until they absorb the oil's aroma.
Add chicken to the seasoned mixture and cook on both sides until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes per side.
Place chicken pieces into a baking dish or paella pan lined with parchment paper.
In another large pot, combine tomato sauce, chicken broth, saffron-infused oil, salt, pepper, paprika, cumin, and any other desired herbs. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
Pour the simmering liquid over the cooked chicken in the baking dish. Arrange remaining ingredients like peppers, zucchini, and onions on top of the chicken for added flavor and color.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 25-30 minutes or until vegetables are tender and chicken is fully cooked.
Serve hot with crusty bread to mop up the flavorful sauce.
